SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
Config
Configuration class.
EarthWallBlock
Represents a temporary earth wall block that disappears after a short period of time.
EarthWandItem
Represents a magical wand that allows the player to summon an EarthWallBlock.
FireWandItem
Represents a magical wand that allows the player to cast a large fireball projectile.
LightningWandItem
Represents a magical wand that summons lightning at a targeted location.
ModBlockEntities
Registers custom block entities.
ModBlocks
Registers custom blocks.
ModItems
Registers custom items.
TGWands
The main mod class.
TGWandsClient
Client-side entry point.
WaterPrisonBlock
Represents a water prison block that traps and slows entities caught inside it.
WaterPrisonBlockEntity
Represents the block entity logic for the WaterPrisonBlock.
WaterWandItem
Represents a magical wand that creates a spherical water prison in front of the player.
